items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Cynthia Cooper and Teresa Weatherspoon drafted teams for the WNBA All-Star game, July 25 in Chicago.

Cooper was assigned Paige Bueckers, Weathersppon assigned Caitlin Clark. Kelsey Mitchell taken by Cooper 4th, Boston by Weatherspoon 5th.

So Clark/Boston are teammates.

items.title: For the most part, the Sparks played solid this afternoon, but the turnovers—19 of them for 30 Minnesota points—will be their downfall. That and the Lynx being +9 in FTA. Hard to make up that level of possession disparity in a game on the road against the league’s best team.

items.body_excerpt: Also, another deal that shows the value of what little move *can* become. Pacers were able to sign Quenton Jackson to a two-way deal in 2024 because they gave Kendall Brown a standard deal and opened a two-way slot. Another chance to look at a young player, and he's still around.

items.title: The Sparks are up 39-37 at the half over the Lynx. Neither team is shooting well, but Minnesota is struggling a ton. They are 0-11 from deep.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks are up 39-37 at the half over the Lynx. Neither team is shooting well, but Minnesota is struggling a ton. They are 0-11 from deep.

items.title: Halftime: Sparks 39, Lynx 37. It was an ugly half for shooting—combined 2-for-23 on 3s—and turnovers—combined 17—but Los Angeles has played well for the most part in the half-court. Rae Burrell leads with 11 points and is +13; Nneka Ogwumike has 10; Cameron Brink with 7.
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Cameron Brink has been hyper aggressive in her first game back from that ankle injury she suffered exactly a month ago. Brink is driving to the rim and getting wherever she wants to go, drawing contact along the way. A very impressive first half from Brink.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Cameron Brink has been hyper aggressive in her first game back from that ankle injury she suffered exactly a month ago. Brink is driving to the rim and getting wherever she wants to go, drawing contact along the way. A very impressive first half from Brink.

items.title: The driving lanes have been wide open for the Sky today with Cardoso out with injury. Seattle's poor perimeter defense is part of it, but the spacing looks great and the ball is moving. Chloe Bibby, who signed a couple weeks ago, adding more frontcourt shooting has been critical.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell

Seattle's poor perimeter defense is part of it, but the spacing looks great and the ball is moving. Chloe Bibby, who signed a couple weeks ago, adding more frontcourt shooting has been critical.
